//: MiOS Oh-My-Posh theme -- two-line prompt with rounded Powerline frames.
Every glyph is an explicit \u escape so the file roundtrips through
any editor / git / OneDrive sync without losing the Nerd Font private-use
code points (which is what was happening before -- segments rendered
as blank '' because the bytes got stripped on save).
Glyphs used (Nerd Font PUA -- requires Symbols-Only Nerd Font fallback,
which automation/09-fonts.sh installs unconditionally on every shape):
\uE0B6   rounded left half-circle (segment opener)
\uE0B4   rounded right half-circle (segment closer)
\uE0B0   Powerline right arrow
\uE0B2   Powerline left arrow
\uE7A8   Linux (Tux)        -- MiOS segment
\uF07B   folder              -- path segment
\uE702   git                 -- git segment
\uE0A0   git branch          -- branch in git template
\uF252   terminal/timer      -- executiontime segment
\uF068   AI/brain (mdi)      -- AI status segment
\uF00C   check / \uF00D x   -- prompt success/failure
Color palette matches the MiOS configurator HTML + Cockpit dark theme
so every surface feels like the same product:
--bg #0e1116  --panel #161b22  --border #30363d
--accent #58a6ff  --ok #3fb950  --warn #d29922  --err #f85149
--muted #8b949e  --git-clean #3fb950  --git-dirty #d29922
Loaded by /etc/profile.d/mios-prompt.sh for every interactive bash/zsh
login. fastfetch + the MiOS dashboard already plain-ASCII-fall-back on
tty0/console where Nerd Font glyphs aren't available.

segments.template:  {{ .HEAD }}{{ if .Working.Changed }} +{{ .Working.String }}{{ end }}{{ if .Staging.Changed }} *{{ .Staging.String }}{{ end }}{{ if gt .Ahead 0 }} ⇡{{ .Ahead }}{{ end }}{{ if gt .Behind 0 }} ⇣{{ .Behind }}{{ end }}
